TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Paraguay u Paraguay sa i labu nu kateban atu kaetipan Amilikan, itiza i 23 00 S, 58 00 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 406,752 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 397,302 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 9,450 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 6,862,812. kakalukan umah sa 53.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 43.80%, zumaay henay umah sa 2.40%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Asuncion . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 14 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Mario Abdo Ben√≠tez (MaliawÔľéAbutuwÔľéPyenitese ť¶¨ťáĆŚ•ß¬∑ťėŅŚ§ęŚ§ö¬∑Ť≤ĚŚįľÁČĻśĖĮ), 1971 a mihcaan 11 a bulad 10 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Paraguay ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihcaan 8 bulad 15 demiad. likisi Pa-la-kuy naw In-ti-an a tademaw kua-la-ni binacadan nu muenenga tina niyaduan, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcan u Pu-taw-ya a tademaw ci A-lei-ya(Alejo Garc√≠a)ku makaadihay, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcan Si-pan-ya masakaputay ku mikuwanay sayaway patideng tu Ya-sung-sen-se . (Alejo Garc√≠a) . nikudan nu lima a mihcaan dindusi nu Ye-su-huy taynin ku nipidindu pasubana tu itidaay a tademaw tu sakay liwmah atu nalimaan nu kawaw. cacay a malebau pitu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mabulaway nu Si-pan-ya bahbahen nu heni ku midinduay nu Ye-su-huy tadenaw. sabaw walu nu seci, Pa-la-kuy niyaduan naw u satabakiay sakadadecdecan nu tademaw ku Nan-mei-cuo. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay mihcan lima a bulad sabaw tu lima a demiad, Palakuy miliyas tu Spain,u Luo-de-li-ke-se ku sananay nu picidekan amikuwan. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu sepat a bataan mihcan u tabakiya nu cacudadan a saydan ci Ka-luo-se.An-tun-ni-aw.Luo-pey-se mitulin sa, malingatu pakunida sa tu kawaw, sipakayda i skaliwmah misiwbayay aut canancanan nu papatideng. 1840 . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku sepat mihcan patideng tu ihuy ku Pa-la-kuy patideng, misitekeday tu kapahay nu kanatal. 1844 . wawa ni Luo-pei-se ci Fuo-lang-si-se-ke. Suo-la-nuo. Luo-pEI-se itini i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihcan mitulin mikuwan, sakaydihan kina cun-kuo-cu-yi . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcan katukuh cacay a malebut walu a lasubu pitu a bataan a mihcan, Pa-la-kuy miucul tu La-tin-mei-cuo saka labadesan anikalepacaw‚ÄĒtu Pa-la-kuy nu kalepacawan, 1865ŚĻīŤá≥1870ŚĻīťĖď, . tina limaay nu mihcan, Pa-la-kuy atu A-ken-tin, Pa-se atu U-la-kuy tatuluay a kanatal mapulung masasuayaw a malepacaw. yadah ku mapataya nu kantal makaala tu 2/3 a masakapahay nu tademaw atu silalaay, nunikalepacawan tina kanatalan tu nikudan caaysatu lekal ku nikaudipan. Śú®5ŚĻīšĻčťĖď, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku tusa (1932) a mihcan katukuh tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku lima (1935) a mihcan a Ta-sa-ku anikalepacawan, Pa-la-kuy makaci tu Puo-li-wi-ya , namakayda i Puo-li-wi-ya maala nu heni ku ahebalay nu Ta-sa-ku nu kitidaan. 1932ŚĻīŤá≥1935 . saka tusa a mihcan Pa Puo sakakaay ci Ay-se-ti-cia-li-wi-ya mala Cungtun, i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan a mihcan walu a bulad pabaluhay yaca tu sinfa, mababenis ku nipikuwan, hamaw sa akapah. . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcan, Paraguay sikawaw makaala tu enem nu bulad malepacaw i labu u hug -tang kumikuwanay. 1947ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku sepat (1954) a mihcan, u huntan a Seteluosena nu hitayan a sakakaay palekal tu saka utiih nu hitay, tawya a mihcaan nu siwa a bulad maala mala cungtun, hidasatu matulin katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa (1989) a mihcan tusa a bulad, malingatu ci Luodelikese a sakakaay nu hitay palekal mibelin tu kawaw.namakayda malingatu misakapah tu kasasiduma tunipi sikiw nu cungtun. 1954ŚĻī, . kakitidaan amica kunikay labu nu Paraguay nu kanatalan, nika namaka Paraguay sawac namaka amis milawit tu timul nu teban a lalaan, u sakaudip nu kanital atu saculil nu angangan. . Paraguay nu kanatal pulung nu kakitidaan sa 406,752 pinfan kunli, tumian itida i teban naca i Nan-mei-cuo . Paraguay sawac palabenisan nina kanatal u wali tipan malatusa ku nikakenisan. . nu tipan nu pankiw u Sya-Ku a niyadu', aahbal nu lala han 247,000 pin-fan kun-li, hamin nu lalaan a kanatal makaala tu enen a bataan idaw ku cacay a kilacan, nina niyadu' u lutuklutukan namin, sibiyaw tu A-ken-ting , Brazil ,Puoliwiya a lutuklutukan a masa Ta-sa-ku malaahebalay nu lutuklutukan. wali nu pankiw masakubukubuay a lala ku sakasinganganan, itida i sasa nu sawacan yadah ku lanulanuan atu sidamekay nu umah, idaw ku kilakilangan, kaliwmahan atu papahabayan tu katalan nu sakapahay a kitidaan. damiad hantu, Paraguay han u caaya kaw caledesay a masengeday a demiadan, pulung nu caypiwac han 24.5 ‚ĄÉ, lalud tu mihcan namaka cacay a bataan a bulad katukuh tu sakatusa a mihcan nu tuluay a bulad, pulung nu caypiwac han 31‚ĄÉ. alahican mikaala tu 40 ‚ĄÉ. kasienawan han namaka enemay a bulad katukuh tu waluay a bulad, pulung nu caypiwac itini i 14.5 ‚ĄÉ. itini i Etaypusen atu San-Pa-la-na-sen a niyadu' alahican tu labii sienaw sa makaala tu zelu ku caypiwac. nalu kanatal Paraguay idaw kucacay a tabakiya nu tatengaay anikababenis nu iciba a sakaudip, numak nutawan a kanatal micumuday nu cancanan pababelihen naca patayda i nutawan a kanatal, tada yadah tu ku adidiay a sakawawen atu icibaay anipacakayan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan (1970) a mihcaan katukuh tu tusa a malebut idaw ku siwa (2009) a mihcaan tu mihmihcan a 7.2ÔľÖ a kilac pulun nuni ka celakan mala sakaudip nu sakalamkammay a Namin a kanatal. 1970Śąį2009 . nian kanatal itini i kitakit hantu u saka tulu a satabakiya nu pakunida hananay a sasiwbayan : u("Dunfunse"śĚĪśĖĻŚłā) mikilul tu Maami atu Hong Kong . duma satu u tademaw miki kaka tu kaliwyumahan a kakitidaan, u namaka umahay matatungsay a sakaudip, u sakaudip nuheni kuydaan. caay kaw tatengaay nu sakaudip a sakatatungus, tadengaay nu sakaudip utiih asipan. . pasayda i tademaw misausi, tatenga nu lacul han itini i cacay a malebat siwa a lasubu walu a bataan (1980) a mihcaan cida satu caay celak. . itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku tulu (2003) a mihcan atu tusa a malebut idaw ku walu (2008) a mihcan Paraguay kasenusa macunus ku sakaudip nuheni, kitakit nu cancanan a tuudan mucelaktu atu talakaway a aca atu nikakapah nu demiad mapulung ku kapah, palekal tu Paraguay a tuud misa ahebal ku saka tahekal nu cancanan. Paraguay u kitakit nu saka enem a satabakiya nu lihum nu sakaasilaculan a kanatal. . tusa a malebut idaw ku walu (2008) a mihcaan makedal, itini i kanatal nunika tadikudan nu sakaudip inu aayawan idaw ku sakalinagatu tu sakatahekal nu tuudan tu nikaada'an atu mahaymaw ku sakaudip.

. kakitidaan ami ¶a kunikaj r~…ĺabu nu paraguaj nu kanatar~…ĺan, nika namaka paraguaj sawa ¶ namaka amis mir~…ĺawit tu timur~…ĺ nu t…ôban a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan, u sakaudip nu kanitar~…ĺ atu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu mar~…ĺatusa ku nikak…ônisan. . nu tipan nu pankiw u sja-ku a nijadu Ē~ °, aańßbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa ńßan ***,*** pin-fan kun-r~…ĺi, ńßamin nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan a kanatar~…ĺ makaar~…ĺa tu …ôn…ôn a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a kir~…ĺa ¶an, nina nijadu Ē~ ° u r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan namin, sibijaw tu a-k…ôn-tiŇč , brazir~…ĺ ,puor~…ĺiwija a r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan a masa ta-sa-ku mar~…ĺaańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan. war~…ĺi nu pankiw masakubukubuaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ku sakasiŇčaŇčanan, itida i sasa nu sawa ¶an jadańß ku r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan atu sidam…ôkaj nu umańß, idaw ku kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, kar~…ĺiwmańßan atu papańßabajan tu katar~…ĺan nu sakapańßaj a kitidaan. damiad ńßantu, paraguaj ńßan u ¶aaja kaw ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj a mas…ôŇč…ôdaj a d…ômiadan, pur~…ĺuŇč nu ¶ajpiwa ¶ ńßan **.* *, r~…ĺar~…ĺud tu mińß ¶an namaka ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad katukuńß tu sakatusa a mińß ¶an nu tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad, pur~…ĺuŇč nu ¶ajpiwa ¶ ńßan ***. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mikaar~…ĺa tu ** *. kasi…ônawan ńßan namaka …ôn…ômaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß tu war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad, pur~…ĺuŇč nu ¶ajpiwa ¶ itini i **.* *. itini i …ôtajpus…ôn atu san-pa-r~…ĺa-na-s…ôn a nijadu Ē~ ° ar~…ĺańßi ¶an tu r~…ĺabii si…ônaw sa makaar~…ĺa tu z…ôr~…ĺu ku ¶ajpiwa ¶. nar~…ĺu kanatar~…ĺ paraguaj idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a tabakija nu tat…ôŇčaaj anikabab…ônis nu i ¶iba a sakaudip, numak nutawan a kanatar~…ĺ mi ¶umudaj nu ¶an ¶anan pabab…ôr~…ĺińß…ôn na ¶a patajda i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺ, tada jadańß tu ku adidiaj a sakawaw…ôn atu i ¶ibaaj anipa ¶akajan. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku siwa (****) a mińß ¶aan tu mińßmińß ¶an a *.** a kir~…ĺa ¶ pur~…ĺun nuni ka ¶…ôr~…ĺakan mar~…ĺa sakaudip nu sakar~…ĺamkammaj a namin a kanatar~…ĺ. ********* . nian kanatar~…ĺ itini i kitakit ńßantu u saka tur~…ĺu a satabakija nu pakunida ńßananaj a sasiwbajan : u("dunfuns…ô"***) mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu maami atu ńßoŇč koŇč . duma satu u tad…ômaw miki kaka tu kar~…ĺiwjumańßan a kakitidaan, u namaka umańßaj matatuŇčsaj a sakaudip, u sakaudip nuńß…ôni kujdaan. ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj nu sakaudip a sakatatuŇčus, tad…ôŇčaaj nu sakaudip utiińß asipan. . pasajda i tad…ômaw misausi, tat…ôŇča nu r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ ńßan itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbat siwa a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶ida satu ¶aaj ¶…ôr~…ĺak. . itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶an atu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶an paraguaj kas…ônusa ma ¶unus ku sakaudip nuńß…ôni, kitakit nu ¶an ¶anan a tuudan mu ¶…ôr~…ĺaktu atu tar~…ĺakawaj a a ¶a atu nikakapańß nu d…ômiad mapur~…ĺuŇč ku kapańß, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu paraguaj a tuud misa ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku saka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ¶an ¶anan. paraguaj u kitakit nu saka …ôn…ôm a satabakija nu r~…ĺińßum nu sakaasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a kanatar~…ĺ. . tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan mak…ôdar~…ĺ, itini i kanatar~…ĺ nunika tadikudan nu sakaudip inu aajawan idaw ku sakar~…ĺinagatu tu sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tuudan tu nikaada Ē~ °an atu mańßajmaw ku sakaudip.
S.FORM: Paraguay u Paraguay sa i labu nu kateban atu kaetipan Amilikan, itiza i 23 00 S, 58 00 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 406,752 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 397,302 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 9,450 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 6,862,812. kakalukan umah sa 53.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 43.80%, zumaay henay umah sa 2.40%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Asuncion . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 14 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Mario Abdo Ben√≠tez (MaliawÔľéAbutuwÔľéPyenitese ť¶¨ťáĆŚ•ß¬∑ťėŅŚ§ęŚ§ö¬∑Ť≤ĚŚįľÁČĻśĖĮ), 1971 a mihcaan 11 a bulad 10 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Paraguay ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihcaan 8 bulad 15 demiad. likisi Pa-la-kuy naw In-ti-an a tademaw kua-la-ni binacadan nu muenenga tina niyaduan, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcan u Pu-taw-ya a tademaw ci A-lei-ya(Alejo Garc√≠a)ku makaadihay, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcan Si-pan-ya masakaputay ku mikuwanay sayaway patideng tu Ya-sung-sen-se . (Alejo Garc√≠a) . nikudan nu lima a mihcaan dindusi nu Ye-su-huy taynin ku nipidindu pasubana tu itidaay a tademaw tu sakay liwmah atu nalimaan nu kawaw. cacay a malebau pitu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mabulaway nu Si-pan-ya bahbahen nu heni ku midinduay nu Ye-su-huy tadenaw. sabaw walu nu seci, Pa-la-kuy niyaduan naw u satabakiay sakadadecdecan nu tademaw ku Nan-mei-cuo. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay mihcan lima a bulad sabaw tu lima a demiad, Palakuy miliyas tu Spain,u Luo-de-li-ke-se ku sananay nu picidekan amikuwan. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu sepat a bataan mihcan u tabakiya nu cacudadan a saydan ci Ka-luo-se.An-tun-ni-aw.Luo-pey-se mitulin sa, malingatu pakunida sa tu kawaw, sipakayda i skaliwmah misiwbayay aut canancanan nu papatideng. 1840 . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku sepat mihcan patideng tu ihuy ku Pa-la-kuy patideng, misitekeday tu kapahay nu kanatal. 1844 . wawa ni Luo-pei-se ci Fuo-lang-si-se-ke. Suo-la-nuo. Luo-pEI-se itini i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihcan mitulin mikuwan, sakaydihan kina cun-kuo-cu-yi . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcan katukuh cacay a malebut walu a lasubu pitu a bataan a mihcan, Pa-la-kuy miucul tu La-tin-mei-cuo saka labadesan anikalepacaw‚ÄĒtu Pa-la-kuy nu kalepacawan, 1865ŚĻīŤá≥1870ŚĻīťĖď, . tina limaay nu mihcan, Pa-la-kuy atu A-ken-tin, Pa-se atu U-la-kuy tatuluay a kanatal mapulung masasuayaw a malepacaw. yadah ku mapataya nu kantal makaala tu 2/3 a masakapahay nu tademaw atu silalaay, nunikalepacawan tina kanatalan tu nikudan caaysatu lekal ku nikaudipan. Śú®5ŚĻīšĻčťĖď, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku tusa (1932) a mihcan katukuh tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku lima (1935) a mihcan a Ta-sa-ku anikalepacawan, Pa-la-kuy makaci tu Puo-li-wi-ya , namakayda i Puo-li-wi-ya maala nu heni ku ahebalay nu Ta-sa-ku nu kitidaan. 1932ŚĻīŤá≥1935 . saka tusa a mihcan Pa Puo sakakaay ci Ay-se-ti-cia-li-wi-ya mala Cungtun, i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan a mihcan walu a bulad pabaluhay yaca tu sinfa, mababenis ku nipikuwan, hamaw sa akapah. . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcan, Paraguay sikawaw makaala tu enem nu bulad malepacaw i labu u hug -tang kumikuwanay. 1947ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku sepat (1954) a mihcan, u huntan a Seteluosena nu hitayan a sakakaay palekal tu saka utiih nu hitay, tawya a mihcaan nu siwa a bulad maala mala cungtun, hidasatu matulin katukuh i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa (1989) a mihcan tusa a bulad, malingatu ci Luodelikese a sakakaay nu hitay palekal mibelin tu kawaw.namakayda malingatu misakapah tu kasasiduma tunipi sikiw nu cungtun. 1954ŚĻī, . kakitidaan amica kunikay labu nu Paraguay nu kanatalan, nika namaka Paraguay sawac namaka amis milawit tu timul nu teban a lalaan, u sakaudip nu kanital atu saculil nu angangan. . Paraguay nu kanatal pulung nu kakitidaan sa 406,752 pinfan kunli, tumian itida i teban naca i Nan-mei-cuo . Paraguay sawac palabenisan nina kanatal u wali tipan malatusa ku nikakenisan. . nu tipan nu pankiw u Sya-Ku a niyadu', aahbal nu lala han 247,000 pin-fan kun-li, hamin nu lalaan a kanatal makaala tu enen a bataan idaw ku cacay a kilacan, nina niyadu' u lutuklutukan namin, sibiyaw tu A-ken-ting , Brazil ,Puoliwiya a lutuklutukan a masa Ta-sa-ku malaahebalay nu lutuklutukan. wali nu pankiw masakubukubuay a lala ku sakasinganganan, itida i sasa nu sawacan yadah ku lanulanuan atu sidamekay nu umah, idaw ku kilakilangan, kaliwmahan atu papahabayan tu katalan nu sakapahay a kitidaan. damiad hantu, Paraguay han u caaya kaw caledesay a masengeday a demiadan, pulung nu caypiwac han 24.5 ‚ĄÉ, lalud tu mihcan namaka cacay a bataan a bulad katukuh tu sakatusa a mihcan nu tuluay a bulad, pulung nu caypiwac han 31‚ĄÉ. alahican mikaala tu 40 ‚ĄÉ. kasienawan han namaka enemay a bulad katukuh tu waluay a bulad, pulung nu caypiwac itini i 14.5 ‚ĄÉ. itini i Etaypusen atu San-Pa-la-na-sen a niyadu' alahican tu labii sienaw sa makaala tu zelu ku caypiwac. nalu kanatal Paraguay idaw kucacay a tabakiya nu tatengaay anikababenis nu iciba a sakaudip, numak nutawan a kanatal micumuday nu cancanan pababelihen naca patayda i nutawan a kanatal, tada yadah tu ku adidiay a sakawawen atu icibaay anipacakayan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan (1970) a mihcaan katukuh tu tusa a malebut idaw ku siwa (2009) a mihcaan tu mihmihcan a 7.2ÔľÖ a kilac pulun nuni ka celakan mala sakaudip nu sakalamkammay a Namin a kanatal. 1970Śąį2009 . nian kanatal itini i kitakit hantu u saka tulu a satabakiya nu pakunida hananay a sasiwbayan : u("Dunfunse"śĚĪśĖĻŚłā) mikilul tu Maami atu Hong Kong . duma satu u tademaw miki kaka tu kaliwyumahan a kakitidaan, u namaka umahay matatungsay a sakaudip, u sakaudip nuheni kuydaan. caay kaw tatengaay nu sakaudip a sakatatungus, tadengaay nu sakaudip utiih asipan. . pasayda i tademaw misausi, tatenga nu lacul han itini i cacay a malebat siwa a lasubu walu a bataan (1980) a mihcaan cida satu caay celak. . itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku tulu (2003) a mihcan atu tusa a malebut idaw ku walu (2008) a mihcan Paraguay kasenusa macunus ku sakaudip nuheni, kitakit nu cancanan a tuudan mucelaktu atu talakaway a aca atu nikakapah nu demiad mapulung ku kapah, palekal tu Paraguay a tuud misa ahebal ku saka tahekal nu cancanan. Paraguay u kitakit nu saka enem a satabakiya nu lihum nu sakaasilaculan a kanatal. . tusa a malebut idaw ku walu (2008) a mihcaan makedal, itini i kanatal nunika tadikudan nu sakaudip inu aayawan idaw ku sakalinagatu tu sakatahekal nu tuudan tu nikaada'an atu mahaymaw ku sakaudip.

nian kanatar~…ĺ itini i kitakit ńßantu u saka tur~…ĺu a satabakija nu pakunida ńßananaj a sasiwbajan : u("dunfuns…ô"***) mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu maami atu ńßoŇč koŇč . duma satu u tad…ômaw miki kaka tu tad…ômaw misausi, tat…ôŇča nu r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ ńßan itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbat siwa a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶ida satu ¶aaj ¶…ôr~…ĺak. . itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku tur~…ĺu sakaasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a kanatar~…ĺ. . tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan mak…ôdar~…ĺ, itini i kanatar~…ĺ nunika tadikudan nu sakaudip inu aajawan idaw ku sakar~…ĺinagatu tu sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tuudan tu nikaada Ē~ °an atu mańßajmaw ku sakaudip.
